name: InterNACHI 13-Section Standard
description: Standards-aligned residential inspection template covering the 13 systems described in the InterNACHI Standards of Practice. Each section has a built-in legal disclaimer and original Information / Limitations / Defects canned comments.

sections.title: Inspection Details
sections.disclaimerText: This summary documents the conditions under which the inspection was performed. Items not present, not safely accessible, or outside the scope of a visual inspection are excluded from the report.

information.title: Client present
information.comment: Client was present during the inspection.

information.title: Agent present
information.comment: Listing or buyer's agent was present during the inspection.

information.title: Clear / dry
information.comment: Weather was clear and dry at the time of inspection.

information.title: Recent rain
information.comment: Significant rainfall occurred within 48 hours prior to inspection.

limitations.title: Dry interior
limitations.comment: Active leakage indicators may not be visible during prolonged dry weather.

information.title: Occupied
information.comment: Property was occupied; furniture and personal belongings limited visibility in some areas.

information.title: Vacant
information.comment: Property was vacant at the time of inspection.

limitations.title: Items blocking access
limitations.comment: Areas concealed by stored items or furniture were not inspected.

information.title: All utilities on
information.comment: Electric, water, and gas utilities were operational at the time of inspection.

limitations.title: Utility off
limitations.comment: One or more utilities were not operational; affected systems could not be tested.

sections.title: Exterior
sections.disclaimerText: The exterior inspection is a visual assessment of readily accessible surfaces and components. Concealed damage behind siding, soil, or vegetation is excluded from the scope of this report.

information.title: Material
information.comment: Exterior wall cladding consists of fiber cement and brick veneer.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Exterior wall cladding appears serviceable with no visible structural defects.

limitations.title: Vegetation
limitations.comment: Sections of cladding behind vegetation or stored items were not inspected.

defects.title: Cracks
defects.comment: Cracks observed in exterior cladding; recommend evaluation and sealing by a qualified contractor.

defects.title: Peeling paint
defects.comment: Peeling or weathered paint observed; recommend repainting to protect substrate.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Trim, soffit, and fascia appear serviceable.

defects.title: Rot observed
defects.comment: Rot observed at trim or fascia; recommend repair to prevent further deterioration.

information.title: Slopes away
information.comment: Site grading slopes away from the foundation as expected.

limitations.title: Snow / mulch
limitations.comment: Areas covered by snow, mulch, or hardscape were not directly evaluated for grade.

defects.title: Negative slope
defects.comment: Negative slope observed at portions of the foundation; recommend regrading to direct surface water away.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Walkways and driveway appear serviceable with no significant trip hazards.

defects.title: Trip hazard
defects.comment: Settlement or displacement creates a trip hazard; recommend repair.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Deck framing, fasteners, and railings appear serviceable.

limitations.title: Skirted
limitations.comment: Concealed deck framing behind skirting or stored items was not inspected.

defects.title: Loose railing
defects.comment: Railing is loose or missing balusters at greater-than-30-inch heights; recommend repair for fall safety.

defects.title: Ledger attachment
defects.comment: Ledger attachment to home is not visible or improperly fastened; recommend evaluation by a qualified contractor.

sections.title: Roof
sections.disclaimerText: Roof inspection is a visual evaluation of accessible roof surfaces, flashing, and penetrations. Areas concealed by snow, debris, or stored items are excluded. Walking on the roof is at the inspector's discretion based on safety and condition.

information.title: Walked
information.comment: Roof was walked and inspected from on top of the roof surfaces.

information.title: From eaves
information.comment: Roof was inspected from accessible eaves and a ladder.

information.title: Ground / drone
information.comment: Roof was inspected from ground level and / or drone imagery only.

information.title: Material
information.comment: Roof covering is asphalt composition shingles.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Roof covering appears serviceable with no significant defects observed at the time of inspection.

limitations.title: Snow / debris
limitations.comment: Areas covered by snow, debris, or solar panels were not inspected.

defects.title: Missing or damaged shingles
defects.comment: Missing, broken, or lifted shingles observed; recommend repair by a qualified roofing contractor.

defects.title: Near end of life
defects.comment: Roof covering shows weathering consistent with the latter portion of its expected service life; recommend planning for replacement.

information.title: Properly sealed
information.comment: Visible flashing at penetrations and wall intersections appears properly sealed.

limitations.title: Concealed
limitations.comment: Concealed flashing under roof covering was not directly inspected.

defects.title: Failed sealant
defects.comment: Sealant at one or more roof penetrations is cracked or aged; recommend renewal.

defects.title: Chimney flashing
defects.comment: Improper or deteriorated flashing observed at chimney; recommend correction by a qualified contractor.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Gutters and downspouts are securely attached.

limitations.title: Storm response
limitations.comment: Performance during heavy rainfall was not directly observed.

defects.title: Discharge at foundation
defects.comment: Downspouts discharge against the foundation; extend at least 4 to 6 feet away to direct water from the foundation.

defects.title: Loose / sagging
defects.comment: Gutters are loose or sagging at attachment points; secure or replace damaged sections.

sections.title: Basement, Foundation, Crawlspace & Structure
sections.disclaimerText: Foundation evaluation is limited to readily visible portions. Concealed structural members behind finishes, insulation, or stored items are excluded. Inspectors are not engineers and do not certify load capacity.

information.title: Type
information.comment: Foundation is poured concrete with a finished basement.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Visible portions of the foundation appear serviceable with no significant structural concerns.

limitations.title: Finished
limitations.comment: Foundation walls are finished; concealed portions could not be evaluated.

defects.title: Cracks
defects.comment: Cracks observed in foundation walls; recommend evaluation by a qualified contractor or structural engineer.

defects.title: Water staining
defects.comment: Water staining observed; recommend monitoring and improving exterior drainage.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Visible floor framing appears serviceable.

limitations.title: Concealed
limitations.comment: Concealed floor framing was not inspected.

defects.title: Sag observed
defects.comment: Sag or deflection observed; recommend evaluation by a qualified contractor.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Visible structural wall framing appears serviceable.

information.title: Crawlspace present
information.comment: Crawlspace was entered and inspected.

information.title: Slab on grade
information.comment: No crawlspace; home is built on a slab.

limitations.title: Access limit
limitations.comment: Crawlspace access was limited by clearance, debris, or insulation.

defects.title: Moisture
defects.comment: Elevated moisture or standing water observed; recommend evaluation and remediation.

sections.title: Heating
sections.disclaimerText: Heating system evaluation is limited to normal operation in heating mode using accessible controls. Heat exchangers, boilers, and concealed components are not disassembled. Annual servicing by a qualified HVAC technician is recommended.

information.title: Forced air furnace
information.comment: Heating system is a forced air gas furnace.

information.title: Equipment age
information.comment: Equipment age estimated based on data plate; remaining service life is at the discretion of a qualified technician.

limitations.title: Heat exchanger
limitations.comment: Heat exchanger was not disassembled and was not directly inspected.

defects.title: Past expected life
defects.comment: Equipment is past its expected service life; recommend evaluation by a qualified technician and budget for replacement.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Visible duct distribution appears serviceable.

information.title: Filter
information.comment: Air filter was inspected; recommend regular replacement per manufacturer guidance.

limitations.title: Concealed
limitations.comment: Concealed duct runs were not inspected.

defects.title: Dirty filter
defects.comment: Air filter is heavily soiled; replace.

information.title: Operates
information.comment: Thermostat operated the heating system using normal controls.

defects.title: No response
defects.comment: Thermostat did not call for heat using normal controls; recommend evaluation by a qualified technician.

sections.title: Cooling
sections.disclaimerText: Cooling systems are not tested when ambient temperatures are below the manufacturer's recommended range, typically 65 degrees Fahrenheit. Refrigerant levels and pressure are not measured.

information.title: Split system
information.comment: Cooling system is a central split system with outdoor condensing unit.

information.title: Equipment age
information.comment: Equipment age estimated from data plate.

limitations.title: Temperature
limitations.comment: Cooling system was not tested due to ambient temperatures below the manufacturer's recommended range.

defects.title: Past expected life
defects.comment: Cooling equipment is past its expected service life; recommend evaluation by a qualified technician.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Visible lineset insulation and condensate drain appear serviceable.

defects.title: Damaged insulation
defects.comment: Damaged or missing lineset insulation observed; recommend replacement.

defects.title: Condensate clog
defects.comment: Condensate drain shows signs of clog or backup; recommend cleaning by a qualified technician.

information.title: Within range
information.comment: Supply / return temperature differential measured within the expected 14 to 22 degree Fahrenheit range.

defects.title: Low differential
defects.comment: Supply / return differential below expected range; recommend evaluation by a qualified technician.

sections.title: Plumbing
sections.disclaimerText: Plumbing inspection is limited to readily visible supply, waste, and venting components. Concealed piping, septic systems, and underground lines are excluded. Hidden leaks may not be apparent during a visual inspection.

information.title: Main shutoff
information.comment: Main water shutoff was located and identified.

information.title: Pressure
information.comment: Functional water pressure observed at multiple fixtures.

limitations.title: Concealed
limitations.comment: Concealed supply piping was not inspected.

defects.title: Active leak
defects.comment: Active leak observed at supply piping; recommend immediate repair by a qualified plumber.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Visible drain, waste, and vent piping appear serviceable.

limitations.title: Concealed
limitations.comment: Concealed waste piping was not inspected.

defects.title: Slow drain
defects.comment: Slow drainage observed at one or more fixtures; recommend clearing.

information.title: Type
information.comment: Water heater is a tank-type gas unit.

information.title: Age
information.comment: Water heater age estimated from data plate.

defects.title: TPR discharge
defects.comment: Temperature pressure relief discharge piping is missing or improperly terminated; recommend correction by a qualified plumber.

defects.title: Past life
defects.comment: Water heater is past its expected service life; recommend planning for replacement.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Visible plumbing fixtures and faucets operated normally during the inspection.

defects.title: Drip
defects.comment: Drip observed at faucet; recommend repair.

sections.title: Electrical
sections.disclaimerText: Electrical inspection is a visual evaluation of accessible service equipment, panels, and a representative sample of devices. Concealed wiring, junction boxes, and load calculations are excluded. Inspectors are not licensed electricians.

information.title: Capacity
information.comment: Service entrance is rated 200 amps based on visible labeling.

information.title: Underground
information.comment: Service is delivered via underground lateral conductors.

limitations.title: Meter sealed
limitations.comment: Utility meter and service drop interior were not opened.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Main panel was opened and inspected. Bonding, grounding, and breaker labeling appear serviceable.

limitations.title: Brand caution
limitations.comment: Panel brand is associated with documented industry concerns; further evaluation by a qualified electrician is recommended.

defects.title: Bonding
defects.comment: Improper bonding observed in main panel; recommend correction by a qualified electrician.

defects.title: Double-tap
defects.comment: Double-tapped breaker observed; recommend correction by a qualified electrician.

information.title: None present
information.comment: No subpanel observed.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Subpanel was inspected and appears serviceable.

information.title: Representative sample
information.comment: A representative sample of receptacles and switches was tested.

information.title: GFCI tested
information.comment: GFCI protection was tested at accessible locations.

limitations.title: Furniture
limitations.comment: Receptacles concealed by furniture or stored items were not tested.

defects.title: Open ground
defects.comment: Open ground observed at one or more outlets; recommend correction by a qualified electrician.

defects.title: No GFCI
defects.comment: GFCI protection is missing at locations now required (kitchen, bath, exterior, garage); recommend upgrade.

information.title: Present
information.comment: Smoke and carbon monoxide alarms were observed at sleeping areas.

limitations.title: Function
limitations.comment: Functional testing of alarms was not performed; recommend testing monthly and replacing batteries annually.

defects.title: Missing
defects.comment: Smoke or carbon monoxide alarms missing at required locations; recommend installation per local code.

sections.title: Fireplace
sections.disclaimerText: Fireplaces and chimneys are inspected visually. A Level II chimney inspection by a qualified sweep is recommended prior to use, especially when the home has been vacant or recently purchased.

information.title: Not present
information.comment: No fireplace observed at the property.

information.title: Wood-burning
information.comment: Wood-burning masonry fireplace observed.

information.title: Gas
information.comment: Gas fireplace insert observed.

limitations.title: Not lit
limitations.comment: Fireplace was not lit during the inspection.

information.title: Visible portions
information.comment: Visible portions of the chimney appear serviceable.

limitations.title: Interior flue
limitations.comment: Interior flue and liner were not directly inspected; Level II evaluation by a qualified sweep is recommended.

defects.title: Missing cap
defects.comment: Chimney cap is missing or damaged; recommend installation to prevent water and animal intrusion.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Firebox and hearth appear serviceable with no visible defects.

defects.title: Cracks
defects.comment: Cracks observed in firebox or hearth; recommend evaluation by a qualified mason or sweep before use.

sections.title: Attic, Insulation & Ventilation
sections.disclaimerText: Attic inspection is limited to areas safely accessible without disturbing insulation or stored items. Concealed framing, wiring, and ducts are excluded.

information.title: Walked
information.comment: Attic was entered and walked at accessible portions.

information.title: Viewed only
information.comment: Attic was viewed from the access opening only.

limitations.title: Blown-in insulation
limitations.comment: Walking on blown-in insulation conceals framing; portions were not inspected to avoid disturbing insulation.

information.title: Type
information.comment: Attic insulation is blown-in cellulose or fiberglass.

information.title: Depth
information.comment: Insulation depth measured within typical regional expectations.

defects.title: Low depth
defects.comment: Attic insulation is below current regional recommendations; recommend supplementing for energy efficiency.

information.title: Adequate
information.comment: Soffit and ridge ventilation appear adequate.

defects.title: Blocked soffits
defects.comment: Soffit vents are blocked by insulation; recommend installation of baffles to maintain airflow.

information.title: Terminated to exterior
information.comment: Bath and kitchen exhaust fans terminate to the exterior as expected.

defects.title: Terminates in attic
defects.comment: Bath fan exhausts into the attic; recommend extending termination to the exterior.

sections.title: Doors, Windows & Interior
sections.disclaimerText: Interior inspection is a visual evaluation of finishes and a representative sample of doors and windows. Cosmetic blemishes and conditions concealed by furnishings are excluded.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: A representative sample of doors operated normally.

defects.title: Sticks
defects.comment: Door sticks or fails to latch; recommend adjustment.

information.title: Sample
information.comment: A representative sample of windows was operated.

limitations.title: Blocked by furnishings
limitations.comment: Windows blocked by drapery or furnishings were not operated.

defects.title: Failed seal
defects.comment: Failed insulating glass seal observed; recommend replacement when convenient.

defects.title: Inoperable
defects.comment: Window is painted or fastened shut; recommend repair to allow normal egress operation.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Visible wall, ceiling, and floor finishes appear serviceable.

limitations.title: Concealed
limitations.comment: Concealed finishes behind furniture or wall coverings were not inspected.

defects.title: Stains
defects.comment: Stains observed on ceiling or wall surfaces; source could not be confirmed at the time of inspection. Recommend further evaluation.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Stairs and handrails appear serviceable.

defects.title: Missing handrail
defects.comment: Required handrail is missing on stairs with four or more risers; recommend installation.

sections.title: Built-in Appliances
sections.disclaimerText: Built-in appliances are tested using normal operating controls only. Calibration, leveling, and concealed components are excluded. Portable appliances do not transfer with the home and are not inspected.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Range, cooktop, and oven operated normally using normal controls.

limitations.title: Calibration
limitations.comment: Oven calibration was not measured.

defects.title: Anti-tip bracket
defects.comment: Anti-tip bracket is missing; recommend installation.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Dishwasher cycled and operated normally.

defects.title: No air gap / high loop
defects.comment: Air gap or high loop is missing; recommend installation per local code.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Garbage disposal operated normally.

information.title: Not present
information.comment: No garbage disposal observed.

defects.title: Leak
defects.comment: Leakage observed at disposal; recommend repair or replacement.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Built-in microwave or vent hood operated normally.

sections.title: Garage
sections.disclaimerText: Garage inspection covers structure, vehicle door operation, and fire-rated separations. Stored items concealing portions of walls and ceilings limit visibility.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Garage structure and floor appear serviceable.

limitations.title: Stored items
limitations.comment: Portions of garage walls and floor were concealed by stored items.

defects.title: Floor crack
defects.comment: Cracks observed in garage floor; recommend monitoring and sealing as needed.

information.title: Serviceable
information.comment: Vehicle door and opener operated normally.

information.title: Safety reverse
information.comment: Auto-reverse safety feature was tested and functioned correctly.

defects.title: Reverse failed
defects.comment: Auto-reverse safety feature failed to operate as expected; recommend service by a qualified technician.

information.title: Intact
information.comment: Garage / dwelling fire separation appears intact at visible locations.

limitations.title: Concealed
limitations.comment: Concealed sections of garage / dwelling separation were not inspected.

defects.title: Service door not rated
defects.comment: Garage service door does not appear to be self-closing or fire-rated; recommend evaluation by a qualified contractor.

defects.title: Penetration
defects.comment: Unsealed penetration through garage / dwelling separation observed; recommend fire-stopping by a qualified contractor.
